### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Pipeline](Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Pipeline.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Pipeline')

## SubmitCommandHandler Class

Handles command submission: writes status, archives, and routes to the aggregate actor\.
Story 2\.6: Writes "Received" status to state store \(advisory, rule \#12\)\.
Story 2\.7: Archives original command for replay \(advisory, rule \#12\)\.
Story 3\.1: Routes command to aggregate actor via CommandRouter\.

```csharp
public class SubmitCommandHandler : MediatR.IRequestHandler<Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Pipeline.Commands.SubmitCommand, Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Pipeline.Commands.SubmitCommandResult>
```
